events.title: KIO Launch Assembly
events.summary: The Kenya Informatics Olympiad was formally announced alongside the Kenya Mathematical Olympiad, Summer STEM, and the African Olympiad Academy.
report: The launch brought together coordinators from across the African Olympiad Academy network, school ICT leads, and partner organisations.
Cycle 2026 opened with a clear road to the Pan-African Informatics Olympiad in July. Registration opened the same evening.
